nasb.text: But when the crowds saw this, they were awestruck, and glorified God, who had given such authority to men.

esv.text: When the crowds saw it, they were afraid, and they glorified God, who had given such authority to men.

cnv.text: 群眾看見，就起了敬畏的心，頌讚那把這樣的權柄賜給人的　神。

ccb.text: 看见的人都充满了敬畏，就赞美把这样的权柄赐给人的上帝。

csbs.text: 众人看见就起了敬畏之心，就荣耀神，因为他赐给人这样的权柄。
